title: Concizumab-mtci Injection: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
st that you are using concizumab-mtci injection. What special dietary instructions should I follow? 
Unless your doctor tells you otherwise, continue your normal diet.
What should I do if I forget a dose? 
If you miss a dose in the first 4 weeks of treatment contact your doctor. They will tell you how much concizumab-mtci to use.
If you miss a maintenance dose, then follow these instructions. 
If you miss one dose, continue your regular dosing schedule. If you miss 2â6 doses, use 2 doses as soon as you remember and then continue your usual dose and schedule beginning the next day. If you miss 7 or more maintence doses, contact your doctor right away for instructions about your next doses. What side effects can this medication cause? 
Concizumab-mtci may cause side effects. Tell your doctor if any of these symptoms are severe or do not go away: 
redness, bruising, or bleeding at the site of injection Some side effects can be serious. If you experience any of these symptoms, call your doctor immediately or get emergency medical treatment: 
itching, redness, rash, hives on the skin; tightness of the chest; wheezing swelling of the face, lips, tongue, or hands; difficulty swallowing or breathing; fast heartbeat; dizziness swelling, warmth, pain, or redness of the skin; shortness of breath or chest pain headache, confusion, difficulty with speech or 
movement, numbness of the face
